message:
Port sigma to the new executor (#6031)

## 🔍 Problem

- `sigma` still used the legacy executor path.
- That left the operator unavailable in neo mode and untested there.

## 🛠️ Solution

- add a new-executor `Operator<table_slice, table_slice>` implementation
- keep the legacy operator path in place while wiring the new IR/plugin
path
- add neo integration tests for basic matching, invalid
`refresh_interval`, and directory recursion
- use checked narrowing when building Arrow record batches

## 💬 Review

- Focus on the new executor flow in `plugins/sigma/src/plugin.cpp`.
- The directory test sorts by `rule.title` to keep the assertion
deterministic.

<sub>resolves TNZ-151</sub>
